description: NeoMundi Barometer visual specification v1.1. Axis bounds and projection formulas remain frozen; public wording has been clarified.

x.label: Responses needing more verification (%)
x.sublabel: the higher this number, the more responses need to be checked

y.label: Change in response meaning (%)
y.sublabel: the meaning of responses changes from one run to another

x_outlier.note: The actual Y position is retained. The true off-scale value is displayed in the badge.

y_outlier.note: Not observed in current campaigns. Implement if needed.

vocabulary.zone_high_sem_low_fact: Meaning often changes, few responses need verification
vocabulary.zone_low_sem_high_fact: Meaning remains stable, more responses need verification
vocabulary.zone_empty_corner: Empty corner : no profile combines major meaning changes and more verification needs
vocabulary.note: Values, bounds and formulas remain unchanged. Public wording has been simplified to explain what is observed.

comparability_guarantee.statement: All weeks use exactly the same axis bounds, projection formulas, vocabulary structure and palette. Direct visual comparison between weeks is guaranteed without recalibration.
comparability_guarantee.axis_change_policy: Any change to domain_min, domain_max or px_per_unit increments spec_version and invalidates direct comparison with prior weeks.

ui.meta_template: NeoMundi Barometer · week {week} · {n_profiles} de-identified profiles · generated {generated}
ui.screen_reader_template: Mapping of {n_profiles} de-identified observed systems. Horizontal axis: responses needing more verification. Vertical axis: change in response meaning. Graphic specification comparable across all weeks.
ui.aria_template: Scatter plot of {n_profiles} observed systems — NeoMundi Barometer week {week}
